scholarships.name: Consortium for Graduate Study in Management
scholarships.amount: Full or partial tuition fellowships (varies by partner school)
scholarships.riceNote: Rice Jones is a confirmed CGSM member school (joined 2017 as the 19th member).
scholarships.why: Mission is to reduce underrepresentation of African Americans and Hispanic Americans in business. Black + Mexican = dual eligibility. Rice is a confirmed partner.
scholarships.requirements: US citizen, permanent resident, or DACA. Demonstrate commitment to Consortium's diversity mission. 4-year bachelor's degree. Apply directly through cgsm.org.
scholarships.notes: R1: Oct 15, 2026 · R2: Jan 5, 2027. Aim for R1 — stronger chances.

scholarships.name: Paul & Daisy Soros Fellowship for New Americans
scholarships.amount: Up to $90,000 over 2 years (50% tuition up to $20K/yr + $25K stipend/yr)
scholarships.riceNote: Open to any accredited US graduate program. Rice fully qualifies.
scholarships.why: Children of immigrants qualify. $90K over 2 years. Nigerian + Mexican parentage is a strong story. APPLICATION IS OPEN NOW.
scholarships.requirements: Must be ≤30 at deadline. Immigrant or child of immigrants. Full-time US grad program 2027-28. Not past 2nd year of current grad program. Transcripts, resume, 2 essays, 3–5 recommendations.
scholarships.notes: Highest-value scholarship on this list. 30 awarded from thousands. Start now.

scholarships.name: Pat Tillman Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.riceNote: Open to any accredited US college or university. Rice fully qualifies.
scholarships.why: Open to service members, veterans, and military spouses. Army Reserve parent connection — verify dependent eligibility.
scholarships.requirements: Full-time enrollment at accredited US college. Service members, veterans, military spouses eligible. Contact scholarships@pattillmanfoundation.org to confirm dependent eligibility.
scholarships.notes: ⚠️ Verify whether son of Army Reserve parent qualifies as a dependent — email them before investing application time.

scholarships.name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund (HSF) Scholar
scholarships.riceNote: Open to any accredited US graduate school. Rice fully qualifies.
scholarships.why: Mexican heritage + son of immigrants = strong match. Grad students eligible. No essays or recs in Phase I — very low friction.
scholarships.requirements: Hispanic heritage. Minimum 2.5 GPA. Full-time enrollment. FAFSA required. Phase I: ~30 min, no essays or docs.
scholarships.notes: Easiest application on this list. Do it.

scholarships.name: Robert Toigo Foundation Fellowship
scholarships.amount: Financial support + mentorship + VC/PE/finance recruiting network
scholarships.riceNote: Not limited to top-15 schools — open to any full-time grad program. Rice eligible. Verify at toigofoundation.org/eligibility.
scholarships.why: For underrepresented minorities pursuing finance careers. Black + Mexican = dual eligibility. Strong VC/PE alumni network.
scholarships.requirements: Full-time grad student pursuing finance career. Strong analytical skills. Virtual attendance required if accepted. Contact: Apply@toigofoundation.org.
scholarships.notes: 2026 cycle closed March 6, 2026. Next cycle opens ~October 2026. Confirm Rice eligibility at toigofoundation.org/eligibility.

scholarships.name: NCAA Postgraduate Scholarship
scholarships.deadline: Spring window closes ~May 4 annually (Outdoor Track & Field)
scholarships.riceNote: One-time grant — not tied to a specific school. Usable at Rice or any grad program.
scholarships.why: Former 4x All-American in Track & Field — exactly the profile this targets. $10K portable grant.
scholarships.requirements: Must be nominated by Texas A&M Faculty Athletics Representative (FAR) — no self-apply. Each school can nominate up to 5 per gender per sport season. Min 3.2 GPA undergraduate.
scholarships.notes: ⚠️ ACTION REQUIRED: Contact Texas A&M Athletics or former coaches to request a FAR nomination. Don't wait until March.

scholarships.name: NBMBAA Scholarship Program
scholarships.riceNote: Independent scholarship, not school-specific. Usable at Rice or any school.
scholarships.why: Core match — Black MBA student, over $2.5M awarded annually.
scholarships.requirements: Active NBMBAA membership required. Academic excellence, leadership. 1 recommendation from instructor/advisor/supervisor.
scholarships.notes: Join NBMBAA now if not already a member — required for eligibility.

scholarships.name: Forté MBA Fellowship
scholarships.deadline: Automatic at Rice MBA admission — no separate application
scholarships.riceNote: Rice University is a confirmed Forté Foundation partner school.
scholarships.why: Rice is a confirmed Forté partner. No separate application — selected automatically at admission.
scholarships.requirements: No separate application. Rice selects Forté Fellows from admitted students based on diverse background + leadership.
scholarships.notes: Joining Forté MBALaunch (deadline Feb 1, 2027) may boost selection odds and waives Rice application fee.

scholarships.name: MLT MBA Prep Program
scholarships.amount: Coaching program + scholarship access + fee waiver at partner schools
scholarships.riceNote: Rice Jones is a confirmed MLT partner — MBA application fee waived for MLT Fellows.
scholarships.why: Rice is a confirmed partner. Coaching program for underrepresented talent. Unlocks partner school scholarships.
scholarships.requirements: US citizen, PR, DACA, or TPS. Min 1 year post-undergrad work experience. Official GMAT/GRE/EA score required. Contact: mba-apply@mlt.org.
scholarships.notes: A prep program, not a direct scholarship — but boosts scholarship outcomes at Rice and other partner schools.

scholarships.name: Military MBA Scholarships (aggregator)
scholarships.riceNote: Varies by individual program — some are school-specific, others are portable. Review each listing.
scholarships.why: Aggregator of military-connected MBA scholarships. Son of Army Reserve parent may qualify as dependent.
scholarships.requirements: Varies per scholarship. Review militarymba.net for dependent-eligible programs.
scholarships.notes: Research individual programs for dependent eligibility and Rice compatibility.

scholarships.name: TY Danjuma MBA Scholarship
scholarships.riceNote: ❌ Requires FT top-10 globally ranked MBA. Rice Jones is ranked #38 FT globally (#16 US). Does not qualify.
scholarships.why: Strong match on identity (Nigerian) but Rice does not meet the FT top-10 global requirement.
scholarships.requirements: Must be at a Financial Times top-10 globally ranked MBA program only.
scholarships.notes: Not applicable at Rice. Would qualify at Harvard, Wharton, LBS, INSEAD, etc. Kept for reference.
